calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Nils Rosenquest, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Maureen Claire Puccinelli, Trustee of the Elizabeth Jane Jehl Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness: Maureen Puccinelli, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Bernadette Jehl.
EXH. 1 - Demand for Possession dtd. 3-3-05-------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2 - Proof of Service dtd. 3-7-05------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 2239 37th Ave., San Francisco.
Damages of $25,000.00
Costs per memo of costs, for a Total of $25,000.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ATTORNEY MICHAEL CASEY WALKER'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT BERNADETTE JEHL.
APPEARANCES: Michael Casey Walker, Esq., 415-337-7864 moving to withdraw as attorney of record.
RULING: In Camera hearing held as Attorney/Client privilege might be disclosed. The Court grants the motion to be relieved as counsel. The transcript of this proceeding is under seal and not to be released except on order of the court. (302/REQ). Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2005 Set For Trial On Dec-12-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Off Calendar
